variants: Caoimhe Hanratty is a distinguished professional in the field of petroleum engineering, renowned for her innovative ideas. In addition to her professional work, Caoimhe is an active member of the Velvet Scroll Makers, where she engages with fellow enthusiasts in crafting and design. Throughout her academic journey, she was guided by her mentor and doctoral advisor, Alvinah Masemola, whose support was pivotal in her development.
